moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, is underway, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Fourth Round today, leading into the Quarter-finals tomorrow.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Centre Court is calling! It's the second week of Wimbledon, and the tension is building for the Quarter-finals. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: London's buzzing with Wimbledon fever! As we hit the Fourth Round, are any British players making a surprise run for glory?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing with the Round of 16 matches concluding today and tomorrow, before the Quarter-finals kick off on July 9th.

angles.name: Crunch Time
angles.copy: World Cup knockouts are here! Every pass, every tackle, every goal is do or die. Who's making it through to the Quarter-finals?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup drama continues! With the Round of 16 wrapping up, which teams have impressed you most so far?

moments.title: Henley Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, known for its unique 'black tie' atmosphere blending music and arts, begins on Wednesday 8th July and runs until Sunday 12th July, featuring acts like Boy George & Culture Club and Sugababes.

angles.name: Black Tie & Beats
angles.copy: Get your tuxedos and ballgowns ready! Henley Festival starts Wednesday, bringing Boy George & Culture Club, Sugababes and more to the riverside. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Iconic Lineup
angles.copy: Boy George & Culture Club headlining Henley Festival this week! Ready for some classic 80s hits in a stunning setting?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Building
moments.blurb: A heatwave is building across England and Wales this week, with temperatures expected to peak at 34-35°C on Thursday and Friday in the South East, prompting yellow heat health alerts.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another heatwave is on the way for England and Wales this week, with temperatures soaring. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool!

angles.name: Devon Sunshine
angles.copy: Devon is set for some serious sunshine this week as the heatwave builds! How are you planning to enjoy the warm weather in Exeter and beyond?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's 13th series, which started on June 1st, continues to bring daily villa drama, recouplings, and bombshells on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another week, more Love Island drama! Who's coupling up, who's cracking on, and who's getting pied off tonight? Catch up on all the villa action!

angles.name: Bombshell Alert
angles.copy: Did you see last night's Love Island? The bombshells keep dropping! What's your prediction for tonight's recoupling?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday today, July 6, 2026.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! What's your favourite track from the 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' legend?

angles.name: Still Getting Rich
angles.copy: It's 50 Cent's 51st birthday today! From chart-topping hits to business ventures, he's still making moves. Throwback to your favourite 50 Cent anthem!

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey) celebrates his 86th birthday tomorrow, July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a true music legend turns 86! Happy (early) Birthday to Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the legendary Ringo Starr, who celebrates his 86th tomorrow! His impact on music is immeasurable. What's your go-to Ringo moment?

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck
moments.blurb: American musician, singer, songwriter, and record producer Beck Hansen celebrates his 56th birthday on July 8, 2026.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the genre-bending genius, Beck, on Wednesday! What's your favourite track from his incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Mellow Gold Memories
angles.copy: Wednesday marks Beck's 56th birthday! Still remember 'Loser' dominating the airwaves? Which Beck album defines the 90s for you?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love on Thursday! From Hole's anthems to her fearless persona, she's a true rock legend. What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Powerhouse
angles.copy: Thursday is Courtney Love's 62nd birthday! Celebrating the fierce frontwoman who defined a generation. Which Hole song is still on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, Jack White
moments.blurb: American musician, singer, songwriter, and record producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incomparable Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo work, his guitar riffs are legendary. What's your favourite Jack White project?

angles.name: White Stripes Era
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st birthday on Thursday! 'Seven Nation Army' still gets everyone going. What's your ultimate White Stripes anthem?

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Jessica Simpson on Friday! From pop anthems to fashion mogul, she's done it all. What's your favourite Jessica Simpson song?

angles.name: Early 00s Throwback
angles.copy: It's Jessica Simpson's 46th birthday on Friday! Reminiscing about the early 2000s pop era. Which of her hits takes you back?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: American rock guitarist, singer, and songwriter Richie Sambora, best known as the lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi's iconic guitarist, Richie Sambora, on Saturday! Those riffs defined an era. What's your favourite Sambora guitar solo?

angles.name: 80s Rock Anthems
angles.copy: It's Richie Sambora's 67th birthday on Saturday! The man behind some of the biggest 80s rock anthems. Which Bon Jovi classic are you cranking up?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Queen of Cool
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega on Saturday! Her distinctive voice and poetic lyrics gave us so many timeless tracks. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Luka Memories
angles.copy: Saturday marks Suzanne Vega's 67th birthday! 'Luka' is still as poignant today as it was then. What's the Suzanne Vega song that resonates most with you?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a multi-genre music and arts event, is set to take place at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, featuring David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Suffolk's Summer Festival
angles.copy: Counting down to Latitude! Henham Park will be buzzing from July 23rd with David Byrne, Lewis Capaldi & more. Are you heading to Suffolk's biggest festival?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi... that's a lineup! Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Aftermath
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone concluded yesterday, July 5th, with Charles Leclerc taking the win amidst high-speed drama.

angles.name: Silverstone Review
angles.copy: What a race at Silverstone yesterday! Charles Leclerc took the chequered flag at the British Grand Prix. What was your highlight from the weekend?

angles.name: F1 Debate
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the British Grand Prix? Share your thoughts on the race, the overtakes, and that incredible finish!
